import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import './Header.css'; const Header = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [showHowItWorks, setShowHowItWorks] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; const toggleHowItWorks = () => { setShowHowItWorks(!showHowItWorks); }; return ( <>
🧠 MindMatch

🚀 How MindMatch Works

{/* Data Flow Diagram */}

📊 Data Flow Architecture

{/* Row 1: User Input */}
👤
User Input
Quiz Answers Profile Data Skills & Interests
→
{/* Row 2: Backend Processing */}
⚙️
Backend Processing
Node.js + Express MongoDB Database RESTful APIs
↓
{/* Row 3: Data Storage */}
💾
Data Storage
Users Collection Mentors Collection Quiz Results Progress Data
→
{/* Row 4: AI Processing */}
🤖
Matching Algorithm
Career Path Analysis Mentor Matching Skill Gap Analysis
↓
{/* Row 5: Results & Output */}
📱
Frontend Display
Personalized Dashboard Mentor Recommendations Progress Tracking
{/* Workflow Steps */}

🎯 User Journey

1

Sign Up & Assessment

Create account and complete career quiz → Data stored in MongoDB

2

Profile Completion

Add skills, education, experience → Updates user collection

3

Mentor Matching

Algorithm matches with mentors → Fetches from mentors collection

4

Progress Tracking

Real-time updates → MongoDB aggregation pipeline

5

Career Growth

Continuous learning → Data analytics for insights

{/* Technical Architecture */}

🛠️ Technical Stack

Frontend
React.js React Router Context API CSS3
Backend
Node.js Express.js JWT Auth REST APIs
Database
MongoDB Mongoose ODM Collections Aggregation
{/* API Endpoints */}

🔗 API Data Flow

GET /api/profile Fetch user data
POST /api/quiz/submit Save quiz results
GET /api/mentors Get mentor matches
PUT /api/profile Update user profile
GET /api/progress Track user progress
{/* Database Schema */}

🗃️ Database Collections

Users Collection
  • profile data
  • quiz results
  • progress tracking
  • mentor requests
Mentors Collection
  • expert profiles
  • availability
  • specializations
  • ratings
Progress Collection
  • completion %
  • skill development
  • mentor connections
  • learning milestones
{/* Quick Start */}

🚀 Get Started

1

Complete your Career Quiz to initialize your data

2

Fill your Profile to enhance matching accuracy

3

Connect with Mentors using our matching algorithm

4

Track Progress with real-time data updates
